summary: Phase C Final Polish - All Tests Pass. SEO Management tab verified with 24 sections (global + homepage + 22 page-specific). SeoMetaEditor has all fields: title, description, keywords, OG tags, robots, canonical. Global SEO has extra fields: site_name, canonical_domain, default_og_image, twitter_handle, google_verification. Accessibility attributes verified: Header role=banner, Footer role=contentinfo, Main role=main, Nav role=navigation, SeoLandingPageTemplate sections with aria-labels (hero, audience, problems, deliverables, process, conversion), Contact form aria-label, 5 mega menus with role=menu.

seo_meta_editor.robots_directive: dropdown with 4 options (index/follow, noindex/follow, index/nofollow, noindex/nofollow)

critical_code_review_comments: SEO category added as first tab in CATEGORIES array
24 SEO sections defined correctly (2 special + 22 page-specific)
SeoMetaEditor component correctly renders all fields with appropriate data-testids
Global SEO section conditionally shows extra fields (isGlobal check)
Accessibility attributes properly applied to Header, Footer, ClientLayout, SeoLandingPageTemplate, and all mega menu components

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages render correctly, all a11y attributes verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test SEO entries (seo_global, seo_about, seo_test_robots) for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Final Polish completed. Admin CMS now has 11 tabs with SEO as first tab (24 sections). SeoMetaEditor provides structured editing for meta tags, OG tags, robots, canonical. Global SEO has additional fields for site_name, canonical_domain, twitter_handle, google_verification, default_og_image. Accessibility: Header has role=banner, Footer has role=contentinfo, Main has role=main, Navigation has role=navigation. SeoLandingPageTemplate sections have aria-labels. All 5 mega menus have role=menu. Skip-to-content link exists. Contact form has aria-label.
